examples.en: Workers poured concrete to build the foundation of the tower.
examples.zh: 工人灌注混凝土來建造這座塔的地基。

examples.en: A strong foundation keeps the whole building stable.
examples.zh: 穩固的地基讓整棟建築保持穩定。

img: concrete building foundation being poured at site

examples.en: The bridge is a huge steel structure over the river.
examples.zh: 這座橋是橫跨河流的巨大鋼構結構。

examples.en: Engineers checked the structure for any cracks.
examples.zh: 工程師檢查這個結構是否有任何裂縫。

img: large steel structure over a river

examples.en: The truck delivered wet concrete to the site.
examples.zh: 卡車把濕的混凝土運送到工地。

examples.en: They let the concrete dry for a few days.
examples.zh: 他們讓混凝土乾燥幾天。

img: concrete mixer truck pouring at construction site

examples.en: A steel beam supports the ceiling of the hall.
examples.zh: 一根鋼樑支撐著大廳的天花板。

examples.en: The crane lifted the heavy beam into place.
examples.zh: 起重機把沉重的橫樑吊放到定位。

img: steel beam being lifted by crane

examples.en: Tall columns hold up the roof of the station.
examples.zh: 高大的柱子撐起了車站的屋頂。

examples.en: Each column is made of reinforced concrete.
examples.zh: 每根柱子都是用鋼筋混凝土製成的。

img: tall concrete columns supporting a station roof

examples.en: Workers climbed the scaffold to paint the wall.
examples.zh: 工人爬上鷹架去粉刷牆面。

examples.en: The scaffold surrounds the whole building.
examples.zh: 鷹架環繞著整棟建築。

img: metal scaffold around a building under construction

examples.en: The crane lifted steel bars to the top floor.
examples.zh: 起重機把鋼筋吊到了頂樓。

examples.en: A tall crane stands over the construction site.
examples.zh: 一台高大的吊車矗立在工地上方。

img: tall tower crane over a construction site

examples.en: The architect showed us the blueprint of the house.
examples.zh: 建築師向我們展示了房子的藍圖。

examples.en: They followed the blueprint step by step.
examples.zh: 他們一步步照著設計圖施工。

img: architect holding a building blueprint

examples.en: The architect designed a modern glass building.
examples.zh: 這位建築師設計了一棟現代的玻璃建築。

examples.en: She wants to become an architect one day.
examples.zh: 她希望有一天成為建築師。

img: architect drawing plans at a desk

examples.en: The engineer checked the safety of the bridge.
examples.zh: 工程師檢查了這座橋的安全性。

examples.en: A civil engineer plans roads and tunnels.
examples.zh: 土木工程師規劃道路和隧道。

img: engineer with hard hat reviewing plans on site

examples.en: They mixed cement with sand and water.
examples.zh: 他們把水泥和沙子與水混合。

examples.en: The wall is held together by cement.
examples.zh: 這面牆是靠水泥黏合在一起的。

img: worker mixing cement in a bucket

examples.en: The frame of the tower is made of steel.
examples.zh: 這座塔的骨架是用鋼材製成的。

examples.en: Steel is strong enough to hold heavy loads.
examples.zh: 鋼材夠堅固,足以承受重物。

img: stacks of steel bars at a construction yard

examples.en: The old house was built of red brick.
examples.zh: 這棟老房子是用紅磚砌成的。

examples.en: He laid one brick on top of another.
examples.zh: 他把一塊磚疊在另一塊磚上。

img: worker laying red bricks on a wall

examples.en: They spread gravel over the muddy path.
examples.zh: 他們在泥濘的小路上鋪了碎石。

examples.en: Gravel is often mixed into concrete.
examples.zh: 砂礫常被混入混凝土中。

img: pile of gravel at a construction site

examples.en: Steel girders form the frame of the bridge.
examples.zh: 鋼製大樑構成了橋的骨架。

examples.en: The workers bolted the girders together.
examples.zh: 工人們用螺栓把大樑鎖在一起。

img: steel girders forming a bridge frame

examples.en: The train passes through a long tunnel.
examples.zh: 火車穿過一條長長的隧道。

examples.en: Engineers dug the tunnel under the mountain.
examples.zh: 工程師在山下挖掘了這條隧道。

img: long tunnel bored through a mountain

examples.en: Machines excavated the ground for the basement.
examples.zh: 機器為地下室開挖了地面。

examples.en: They excavated a deep hole for the pool.
examples.zh: 他們為泳池挖了一個深洞。

img: excavator digging a deep hole at site

examples.en: They reinforced the wall with steel bars.
examples.zh: 他們用鋼筋加固了這面牆。

examples.en: The bridge was reinforced to carry more weight.
examples.zh: 這座橋被加固以承受更多重量。

img: steel bars reinforcing a concrete wall

examples.en: The team did a survey of the land before building.
examples.zh: 團隊在動工前對這塊地進行了測量。

examples.en: A land survey shows the exact borders.
examples.zh: 土地測量能顯示出確切的邊界。

img: surveyor using a tripod instrument on land

examples.en: They will demolish the old factory next week.
examples.zh: 他們下週將拆除這座舊工廠。

examples.en: The building was demolished in one afternoon.
examples.zh: 這棟建築在一個下午內就被拆除了。

img: machine demolishing an old building

examples.en: The crew laid new pavement on the highway.
examples.zh: 工人在公路上鋪設了新的路面。

examples.en: Cracks appeared in the old pavement.
examples.zh: 舊路面上出現了裂縫。

img: crew laying asphalt pavement on a road

examples.en: Hot asphalt was spread across the road.
examples.zh: 熱柏油被鋪滿了整條道路。

examples.en: The parking lot is covered with asphalt.
examples.zh: 這座停車場鋪滿了柏油。

img: hot asphalt being spread on a road

examples.en: The steel framework of the building is finished.
examples.zh: 這棟建築的鋼骨架已經完成了。

examples.en: Wooden framework holds up the new roof.
examples.zh: 木製框架撐起了新屋頂。

img: steel framework of a building under construction

examples.en: The bridge can carry a heavy load of trucks.
examples.zh: 這座橋可以承載卡車的重負載。

examples.en: Engineers calculate the load on each column.
examples.zh: 工程師會計算每根柱子承受的荷重。

img: loaded trucks crossing a bridge

examples.en: Steel is a durable material for tall buildings.
examples.zh: 鋼是建造高樓的耐用材料。

examples.en: They chose durable bricks for the outer wall.
examples.zh: 他們為外牆選用了耐用的磚塊。

img: close up of durable brick and steel wall

examples.en: Visitors must wear a helmet on the site.
examples.zh: 訪客在工地上必須戴安全帽。

examples.en: The construction site was busy all day.
examples.zh: 這個工地整天都很忙碌。

img: busy construction site with workers and machines

examples.en: The floor is a thick slab of concrete.
examples.zh: 地板是一塊厚厚的混凝土板。

examples.en: They poured the slab for the ground floor.
examples.zh: 他們為一樓灌注了樓板。

img: flat concrete slab poured on the ground

examples.en: The stone bridge has a wide arch in the middle.
examples.zh: 這座石橋中間有一個寬闊的拱。

examples.en: An arch spreads the weight to both sides.
examples.zh: 拱形能把重量分散到兩側。

img: stone bridge with a wide arch

examples.en: Good insulation keeps the building warm in winter.
examples.zh: 良好的隔熱層讓建築在冬天保持溫暖。

examples.en: They added insulation inside the walls.
examples.zh: 他們在牆內加裝了隔熱材料。

img: worker installing insulation inside a wall

examples.en: Welding joins two steel bars together.
examples.zh: 焊接把兩根鋼筋接合在一起。

examples.en: The worker wore a mask during welding.
examples.zh: 工人在焊接時戴著面罩。

img: worker welding steel with bright sparks

examples.en: They dug a trench to lay the water pipes.
examples.zh: 他們挖了一條溝渠來鋪設水管。

examples.en: The deep trench runs along the road.
examples.zh: 這條深溝沿著道路延伸。

img: deep trench dug for pipes along a road

examples.en: The workers rest in a small site cabin at noon.
examples.zh: 工人們中午在小工務所裡休息。

examples.en: Plans are kept inside the office cabin.
examples.zh: 施工圖被放在辦公工務所裡。

img: portable site cabin at a construction area

examples.en: The layout of the rooms looks well planned.
examples.zh: 這些房間的配置看起來規劃得很好。

examples.en: They changed the layout of the office floor.
examples.zh: 他們更改了辦公樓層的佈局。

img: floor layout plan spread on a table

examples.en: The plan shows the exact dimensions of each room.
examples.zh: 這張圖顯示了每個房間的確切尺寸。

examples.en: Please check the dimensions before cutting.
examples.zh: 切割前請先確認尺寸。

img: blueprint with room dimensions labeled

examples.en: The old bridge might collapse under heavy trucks.
examples.zh: 這座舊橋在重卡車下可能會倒塌。

examples.en: The roof collapsed after the earthquake.
examples.zh: 屋頂在地震後倒塌了。

img: collapsed roof of an old building

examples.en: The drawing shows the front elevation of the house.
examples.zh: 這張圖顯示了房子的正面立面圖。

examples.en: The elevation of the site is above sea level.
examples.zh: 這個場地的高度在海平面之上。

img: front elevation drawing of a house

examples.en: Steel reinforcement makes the concrete stronger.
examples.zh: 鋼筋補強讓混凝土更堅固。

examples.en: The wall needs extra reinforcement here.
examples.zh: 這面牆在這裡需要額外的補強。

img: steel reinforcement bars in a concrete floor

examples.en: The contractor hired ten workers for the job.
examples.zh: 承包商為這項工程雇用了十名工人。

examples.en: We signed a contract with a local contractor.
examples.zh: 我們和一家當地承包商簽了合約。

img: contractor with plans talking to workers

examples.en: Every worker must wear a helmet on site.
examples.zh: 每位工人在工地都必須戴安全帽。

examples.en: His yellow helmet protected his head.
examples.zh: 他的黃色安全帽保護了他的頭部。

img: construction worker wearing a yellow safety helmet

examples.en: They spread plaster to make the wall smooth.
examples.zh: 他們塗上灰泥讓牆面變得平滑。

examples.en: The plaster needs a day to dry.
examples.zh: 灰泥需要一天才能乾。

img: worker spreading plaster on a wall

examples.en: The engineer measured the girth of the pillar.
examples.zh: 工程師測量了柱子的周長。

examples.en: A thicker girth gives the column more strength.
examples.zh: 更粗的圍度給了柱子更多強度。

img: worker measuring the girth of a large pillar

examples.en: They plan to renovate the old train station.
examples.zh: 他們計畫翻新這座舊火車站。

examples.en: The team renovated the bridge last year.
examples.zh: 團隊去年整修了這座橋。

img: old station being renovated by workers

examples.en: Good drainage keeps water off the road.
examples.zh: 良好的排水能讓水離開路面。

examples.en: They built a drainage channel beside the wall.
examples.zh: 他們在牆邊建了一條排水渠。

img: drainage channel beside a new road

examples.en: Stone pillars stand at the entrance of the hall.
examples.zh: 石柱矗立在大廳的入口處。

examples.en: Each pillar carries part of the roof's weight.
examples.zh: 每根支柱承擔了屋頂的部分重量。

img: stone pillars at a grand entrance

examples.en: They ordered building materials for the new house.
examples.zh: 他們為新房子訂購了建材。

examples.en: This material is both light and strong.
examples.zh: 這種材料既輕又堅固。

img: stacks of building materials at a site

examples.en: The road is closed due to construction.
examples.zh: 這條路因施工而封閉。

examples.en: Construction of the tower took three years.
examples.zh: 這座塔的施工花了三年。

img: large tower under construction with cranes

examples.en: Engineers tested the stability of the tower.
examples.zh: 工程師測試了這座塔的穩定性。

examples.en: A wide base gives the building more stability.
examples.zh: 寬闊的底座給了建築更多穩定性。

img: engineer testing stability of a tall tower

examples.en: The scaffolding was built around the tall tower.
examples.zh: 鷹架系統被搭建在這座高塔的四周。

examples.en: Safe scaffolding lets workers reach high walls.
examples.zh: 安全的鷹架系統讓工人能觸及高牆。

img: full scaffolding system covering a tall tower

examples.en: The surveyor marked the corners of the plot.
examples.zh: 測量員標出了這塊地的各個角。

examples.en: A surveyor checks the level of the ground.
examples.zh: 測量員會檢查地面的水平。

img: surveyor marking corners of a plot of land

examples.en: The drawing shows where each pipe should go.
examples.zh: 這張施工圖顯示了每根管線該放的位置。

examples.en: They updated the drawing after the change.
examples.zh: 他們在變更後更新了施工圖。

img: technical construction drawing on paper
